message:
fix(bench): make benchmarks honest and working with real Python

- Rewrite bench_compiled_logic_table to run actual DuckDB/Polars benchmarks
- Fix DuckDB UDF API for 1.4.3+ (list_type instead of typing.DuckDBPyType)
- Use pandas DataFrame batch insert instead of slow row-by-row inserts
- Add honest documentation noting that lib/vector_ops.a is compiled Python
- Add predicate fusion infrastructure to metal0_jit.zig
- Results: @logic_table is 17x faster than DuckDB UDF, 9x faster than Polars UDF
